title: BlackSky Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text: Total revenue for the second quarter of 2024 was $24.9 million, up 29% from the second quarter of 2023. The revenue growth was driven by both imagery services and professional engineering services, with imagery and software analytical services revenue up 14% to $17.5 million and professional and engineering services revenue up 87% to $7.5 million. BKSY delivered its third straight quarter of positive adjusted EBITDA, improving $7.9 million year-over-year and beating consensus by 53%. Additionally, total cost of sales as a percentage of revenue improved to 28% for the second quarter of 2024, compared to 44% in the second quarter of 2023. Net loss for the third quarter of 2024 was $12.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA for the third quarter of 2024 was $0.7 million. The company continues to demonstrate improving operational efficiency and unit economics as revenue grows and cost of sales declines as a percentage of revenue.
